notes: Mode: pg-dump. Logical Postgres backup via `docker exec tuax-postgres pg_dump -Fc -U tuax tuax_mie` piped over ssh. Custom-format dump (-Fc); restore with pg_restore. Auth: the password lives in the postgres container env (POSTGRES_PASSWORD set in docker-compose.yml on the VPS), NEVER in this file. restore_test verifies the PGDMP magic header (first 5 bytes = b'PGDMP'). expected_size_bytes=512 MiB is initial estimate; tune by observing real dumps. A future Backup Axis iteration may add the rabbitmq_data volume via a docker-volume-tar config.
